report_metadata.step_description: Merge the design brief extraction (Step 4), site plan extraction (Step 5), and enriched asset register (Step 9) into a single unified Customer Connections Application Review report. Summarize all extracted supply requirements, funding items, site plan data, and the enriched asset list (with symbol labels identifying each asset as NEW, EXISTING, or REMOVE) in a consolidated JSON report.

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator
